hooks.command: $j = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($j.tool_input.command -notmatch 'git\s+commit') { exit 0 }; $staged = git diff --cached --name-only 2>$null; if (-not $staged) { exit 0 }; $pats = @('sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}', 'AIza[0-9A-Za-z\-_]{35}', '(?i)password\s*=\s*\S+', '(?i)api[_\-]?key\s*=\s*\S+', 'Bearer\s+[a-zA-Z0-9\-._~+\/]+=*', '[A-Z0-9]{20}:[A-Za-z0-9+\/]{40}', '(?i)Server=[^;]+;.*Password='); $hits = @(); foreach ($f in $staged) { $c = git show ":$f" 2>$null; foreach ($p in $pats) { if ($c -match $p) { $hits += $f; break } } }; if ($hits.Count -gt 0) { [Console]::Out.WriteLine((@{ continue = $false; stopReason = 'SECRET SCAN BLOCKED: Possible secrets in staged files: ' + ($hits -join ', ') + '. Review and remove before committing.' } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress)) }
